tasks.subject: Task 1: Add popoverSlotRecipe in components/popover/recipe.ts
tasks.description: Create Chakra v3 slot recipe at src/components/popover/recipe.ts with teleport-popover styling. Verified via pnpm generate-theme && pnpm type-check.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Register popover recipe in src/theme/slotRecipes.ts
tasks.description: Added popover: popoverSlotRecipe to slotRecipes map alphabetically. Verified via pnpm generate-theme && pnpm type-check.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Implement Popover wrapper component
tasks.description: Created src/components/popover/Popover.tsx with three-mode wrapper (compositional / trigger= / anchorRef) plus custom PopoverContent handling Portal+Positioner+Arrow. Verified via pnpm type-check.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Re-export popover from components/index.ts
tasks.description: Added export * from './popover' alphabetically in the components barrel. Verified via pnpm type-check.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Add placement/gutter shortcuts to Tooltip
tasks.description: Tooltip gains optional placement/gutter flat props merged into positioning (which wins on conflict). Verified via pnpm type-check.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Write Popover Storybook stories
tasks.description: Created src/storybook/stories/components/overlays/Popover.stories.tsx covering Default, Placements, Arrow, Convenience, Controlled, Layout, Positioning. 69/69 storybook tests pass. Implementer applied three test-realism fixes: within(document.body) for portalled content, waitFor for presence-animation race, Escape keypress to trigger onOpenChange in controlled mode.
